commit.message:
Add RequireObjectCoercible + ToString coercion to String prototype methods

String.prototype methods now properly:
- Throw TypeError when called on null/undefined
- Coerce non-string primitives (Number, Boolean, BigInt) via ToString
- Coerce generic objects via JS-level ToString (calls toString/valueOf)

Only applies to string method builtin IDs (110-134) to avoid affecting
other native functions.

Cluster 37 (String): 540 → 394 failures (146 tests fixed)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore(ci): remove superseded post-ci-summary.yml workflow

The post-ci-summary.yml workflow was disabled (workflow_dispatch only)
and superseded by post-ci-summary-on-ci-success.yml. However, a YAML
parse error in its Python heredoc (unindented content inside run: |
block) caused GitHub to record a failure on every push.

Removing the file entirely to eliminate the spurious failures.

commit.message:
feat: add cricsheet_cache table + import IPL 2026 fallback data

- Migration 023: cricsheet_cache table with match_date index + RLS
- Import script: auto-loads .env.local for local dev
- Imported 15 IPL 2026 matches from cricsheet.org

Fallback flow: CricAPI rate-limited → query cricsheet_cache by date →
return cached performances. Cron also auto-syncs recent matches.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: multi-provider routing with 14 built-in providers

Major refactoring to support multiple providers with model-based routing.

Architecture:
- Auth → Router (glob match) → Provider Dispatch → Backend API
- 14 known providers with hardcoded URLs (OpenAI, OpenRouter,
  DeepSeek, GLM, Qwen, Gemini, Anthropic, MiniMax, OpenCode,
  Doubao, SiliconFlow, Groq, Mistral, Together)
- PROVIDERS JSON env var for multi-provider config
- Per-provider API keys (PROVIDER_<NAME>_API_KEY as secrets)
- Per-provider model mapping and custom headers
- Full backward compatibility with legacy single-provider config

New files:
- src/auth.ts: Extracted proxy-level authentication
- src/router.ts: Model→Provider routing with glob matching
- src/providers/registry.ts: Known providers registry
- src/providers/index.ts: Provider dispatch logic
- src/providers/openai-provider.ts: OpenAI-compatible provider
- src/providers/anthropic-provider.ts: Anthropic passthrough provider

Rewritten:
- src/config.ts: Multi-provider PROVIDERS JSON + legacy fallback
- src/handlers.ts: Simplified to parse → route → dispatch
- README.md: Full bilingual rewrite with multi-provider docs

All 136 tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add annexB: escape/unescape, HTML wrapper methods, trimLeft/trimRight, fix substr UTF-16

- Implement escape() and unescape() global functions (B.2.1.1, B.2.1.2)
- Register escape/unescape on globalThis with proper name/length metadata
- Add String.prototype HTML wrapper methods: anchor, big, blink, bold,
  fixed, fontcolor, fontsize, italics, link, small, strike, sub, sup
- Add trimLeft/trimRight as aliases for trimStart/trimEnd
- Register substr with proper name/length metadata
- Fix substr to work directly on UTF-16 code units (preserves lone surrogates)

Cluster 41 (annexB): 189 → 83 failures (106 tests fixed)

提取 EN/DE/FR/IT/ES 游戏文本字符串 (data/game-strings.s)

- 新增 data/game-strings.s：涵盖 ROM 0x1DC4620~0x1DFF9D1（242610 字节，8210 行）
  - 5 种语言 × 4 个子块 = 20 个文本段
  - Latin-1 特殊字符（ü/ö/ä/é/ô/à 等）用 \\xNN 转义写入 .ascii 指令
  - 卡组名位置保留 deck_str_XX_YY 标签（共 160 个）
  - 子块间零填充用 .incbin 保持原始数据

  删除原文件中 EN/DE/FR/IT/ES 卡组名段（已并入 game-strings.s）
- 更新 asm/rom.s：
  新 split 顺序：incbin(0x1000000) → deck-strings.s → game-strings.s
  → incbin(0x1DFF9D2, 0x5933C) → opponent-card-values.s → ...
- byte-identical 验证通过（差异：0 字节）

feat: RabbitMQ-backed allocation processing with retry and DLQ (#10)

* Initial plan

* feat: replace Spring event processing with RabbitMQ for allocation retry

- Add spring-boot-starter-amqp and testcontainers:rabbitmq dependencies
- Add AllocationLockContentionException for SELECT FOR UPDATE contention
- Modify AllocationProcessor to throw AllocationLockContentionException on lock contention (instead of silently marking FAILED), enabling RabbitMQ retry
- Create RabbitMQConfig with allocation.queue (DLX-backed), allocation.dlq, allocation.dlx exchange, and stateless retry interceptor (3 attempts) + RepublishMessageRecoverer to DLQ
- Update AllocationEventHandler to publish allocation ID to RabbitMQ after transaction commit (instead of calling processor directly)
- Create AllocationMessageListener to consume from allocation.queue and call AllocationProcessor
- Remove AllocationProcessor dependency and direct processAllocation() call from AllocationService (processing is now fully async via queue)
- Update application.yml with RabbitMQ connection config
- Update AllocationControllerIntegrationTest to provision RabbitMQ via Testcontainers
- Update AllocationServiceTest to remove AllocationProcessor mock
- Update AllocationProcessorTest to assert exception on lock contention
- Add AllocationMessageListenerTest"

- AllocationProcessor: throw AllocationLockContentionException on partial lock contention (lockedCandidates.size < candidateIds.size)
- Add AllocationProcessorTest: partial lock contention test case
- Refactor AllocationEventHandler into AllocationEventPublisher port (domain/port/out) + RabbitMQAllocationEventPublisher adapter (adapter/out/messaging); AllocationService now calls the port directly; remove AllocationEventHandler
- Rename adapter.in.messaging → adapter.messaging; move AllocationMessageListener
- Add k8s/rabbitmq-deployment.yaml, k8s/rabbitmq-service.yaml; update configmap, secret, deployment with RabbitMQ env vars and wait-for-rabbitmq init container with timeout
- Add AllocationRetryIntegrationTest verifying DLQ routing after 3 consecutive AllocationLockContentionExceptions
- Fix RabbitMQConfig retry policy to only retry AllocationLockContentionException (traverseCauses=true, defaultValue=false)"

commit.message:
Refactor: extract inline CSS to external style.css + fix JS dead code

- Extract all 7 inline <style> blocks into /style.css
- Replace inline styles with <link rel="stylesheet" href="/style.css">
- Remove dead [data-contact] querySelector from applyLocale()
- Fix orphaned CSS selector (.timeline-badge.timeline-badge) that was
  absorbing .nav-toggle{display:none} rule across block boundary
- Regenerate all .gz and .br compressed files

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Style recent subjects with accent color and bold label (closes #12) (#28)

* Style recent subjects with accent color and bold label (closes #12)

Recent subjects (last 14 days) now render with an accent-colored bold
Span label instead of a plain ★ prefix string, making them visually
distinct at a glance. A thin hr divider separates the recent group from
older subjects when both groups are non-empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Update tests/test_app.py

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Refactor subject checklist to use two separate dcc.Checklists with real html.Hr divider

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/rojasgabriel/chipmunk-dashboard/sessions/1d527458-5a09-4d59-aae9-bac7a4b46c9d

Co-authored-by: rojasgabriel <88155405+rojasgabriel@users.noreply.github.com>

* Precompute initial subject opts to avoid calling _build_subject_options twice in sidebar layout

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/rojasgabriel/chipmunk-dashboard/sessions/1d527458-5a09-4d59-aae9-bac7a4b46c9d

Co-authored-by: rojasgabriel <88155405+rojasgabriel@users.noreply.github.com>

* Constrain setuptools<80 to restore pkg_resources for datajoint 0.x

setuptools 82 removed pkg_resources from its distribution, breaking
datajoint 0.14.x which imports it directly. Pinning setuptools<80 keeps
pkg_resources available and also prevents the resolver from picking
datajoint>=2.0 (which labdata does not support).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove star prefix from recent subjects, keep color-only distinction

The accent color + bold is sufficient visual distinction; the ★ was
redundant. Updated sidebar legend to read "blue = session in last 2 weeks".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix(posts): render markdown tables

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add natural Telegram chat flow

Keep chat mode active after /ask, forward plain follow-up messages with recent conversation context, and document the Copilot CLI-backed configuration.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(docker): use RUN --mount instead of COPY --from

JuiceFS-backed BuildKit storage doesn't support hash computation
on cross-stage COPY. Use RUN --mount=type=bind to bypass checksum.
Also remove OpenSSL dependency (server uses rustls via reqwest).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
ci: add coverage reporting, gosec, and Trivy scanning

- Upload coverage to Codecov on pull requests
- Run gosec static analysis for security issues
- Run Trivy filesystem scan for CRITICAL/HIGH vulnerabilities

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
